programs.title: Killer Vacation
programs.desc: Jake takes his pregnant girlfriend, Lindsey, to an upscale resort. When they arrive, Lindsey discovers that Jake's soon-to-be-ex is there. Soon, it becomes apparent that someone is determined to make sure that Lindsey never uses her return ticket.

programs.title: Secrets at the Inn
programs.desc: A woman assumes responsibility for her niece after her estranged sister dies while renovating a historic inn. As mysterious things begin to happen at the inn, she starts to question everyone -- from her troubled niece to the handsome contractor.

programs.title: Secrets of an Escort
programs.desc: A single mother works at a hotel during the day and as a high-end escort at night. When her daughter goes missing, she takes matters into her own hands to learn who from her various lives would take her child.

programs.title: Deadly Estate
programs.desc: When a hotel manager is wrongly accused of killing the soon-to-be new owner's son, she must use her hospitality skills to prove her innocence.

programs.title: Girl in Room 13
programs.desc: A drug dealer holds young Grace captive in a hotel room so he can abuse her and sell her into human trafficking. Meanwhile, Grace's mother uncovers the shocking truth about trafficking as she stops at nothing to find her beloved daughter.

programs.title: Murder at Highland Manor
programs.desc: Kate takes a job as a live-in tutor at a secluded Scottish estate for a mother and daughter who have survived domestic abuse. She soon becomes embroiled in the family's deadly secrets when she discovers the previous au pair mysteriously disappeared.
